name: 2 Tier Wood Kids' Book Shelf Natural - Pillowfort™: Wall Bookshelf Organizer, Off-White, No Assembly Required
description: Bring functional style to your kids' space by hanging this 2-Tier White Bookshelf from Pillowfort™ beside a comfy chair in their playroom for an instant reading nook. The two-tier shelf can act as a spot for picture books or as a magazine rack. Whether they want to read about bears living in the forest or weather on other planets, this bookshelf will hold all of their favorite reading material while displaying the covers.
